name: RABBIT-CAGE-23
title: active .rbt-prompt-counter and .rbt-sync-counter artifacts use deprecated rbt- prefix
description: The rbt- prefix is deprecated. Active violations: (1) .rbt-prompt-counter — written in settings.json hook, refresh.sh, sync-check.sh, rabbit-refresh.md, workspace-tree.sh; (2) .rbt-sync-counter — written in sync-check.sh; (3) RBT_REFRESH_EVERY env var — read in sync-check.sh; (4) check-naming.sh comment line 83 says 'Internal artifacts use rbt-' which documents the wrong (deprecated) policy. All rbt- file artifacts and env vars must be renamed to use the rabbit- prefix (or no prefix).
